poses.description: Neutral full-body standing pose for scale and costume continuity.
Close-up face angle preserving eyes, nose, lips, hairline, and expression style.
poses.use_when: dialogue, shock, internal thought, emotional beats

poses.description: Hands interacting with chains, weapon, relic, document, or clothing without anatomy drift.
Lying on prison floor, full body visible from hair to feet, torn white dress, chains, bruised wrists and legs, non-sexual tragic framing.
poses.use_when: chapter 1 panels 1-3 and continuity from panel 1 into panel 2

poses.description: Pushing herself upright despite chains, shoulders straight, injured but dignified.
